entries.title: `receipt` defaults to Opus rate
entries.summary: - **`jcodemunch-mcp receipt`** default `--model` flipped from `sonnet` to `opus`. Most jcodemunch users running heavy retrieval workloads are on an Opus-grade model — the headline number should reflect the rate where savings actually move a budget needle. Sonnet and Haiku

entries.title: `receipt` token-economy ledger
entries.summary: todo.md item #3. New CLI surface; no behaviour change to existing tools.

entries.title: One-click install badges + auto-recency block + version-drift hint
entries.summary: Top-of-fold UX wins (todo.md items #1, #2). Three additive surfaces, zero behaviour change to existing tools.
